problem id: fb5a7b9e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  10010011 -> 00101001
  01101101 -> 10010110
  00110000 -> 00011000
  11101111 -> 10010111
  01011010 -> 01101101
  00000111 -> 11100011
  01000111 -> 11000011
  11101101 -> 11010110
  01011000 -> 00101100
  01000010 -> 01100001

query: 11110100
predicted answer: 11111010
